---
title: 'Mechanisms of the Tropical Upwelling Branch of the Brewer–Dobson Circulation:
  The Role of Extratropical Waves'
pagetitle: 2011-12-1-Chen2011c - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2011
author: Gang Chen and Lantao Sun
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 68, 2878--2892, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-044.1.
recommended_citation: 'Gang Chen and Lantao Sun, 2011: Mechanisms of the Tropical
  Upwelling Branch of the Brewer–Dobson Circulation: The Role of Extratropical Waves,
  <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 68, 2878--2892, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-044.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-044.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Mechanisms of the Tropical Upwelling Branch of the Brewer–Dobson Circulation: The Role of Extratropical Waves

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2011*

**Recommended citation:** Gang Chen and Lantao Sun, 2011: Mechanisms of the Tropical Upwelling Branch of the Brewer–Dobson Circulation: The Role of Extratropical Waves, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 68, 2878--2892, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-044.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-044.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
